tools.name: get_version
tools.description: Returns application version and informational version string.

tools.name: get_current_route
tools.description: Returns the current navigation route and view model name.

tools.name: navigate_to
tools.description: Navigates to overview, notes, chat, mindmap, path, or settings. Optional entity_id is passed to the route (e.g. note id, mindmap id).

tools.name: open_settings
tools.description: Opens the Settings screen. Optional section hint.

tools.name: get_skills
tools.description: Lists all enabled Mnemo skills (ids, descriptions, hints, and whether each skill exposes tools).

tools.name: fetch_skill
tools.description: Returns the system prompt fragment and full tool definitions (JSON Schema parameters) for one skill_id.

skill_id.description: Skill id from get_skills or NONE

tools.name: inject_skill
tools.description: Returns the same payload as fetch_skill. Optionally applies skill_id for this conversation so later turns use that skill's tools/context (use NONE or empty skill_id to clear).

skill_id.description: Target skill id, NONE, or omit/empty to clear override

apply_for_conversation.description: Default true: persist for this chat thread when a routing key exists
